message:
feat: add CTCLoss, nonzero/masked_select, Dataset/DataLoader, searchsorted, state dict save/load

- ft-nn: CTCLoss with forward-backward DP algorithm, log-domain arithmetic,
  batched computation, configurable blank/reduction/zero_infinity (12 tests)
- ft-api: tensor_nonzero, tensor_nonzero_as_tuple, tensor_masked_select with
  backward gradient flow via tensor_apply_function (11 tests)
- ft-api: tensor_searchsorted (1D + batched 2D) and tensor_bucketize with
  lower_bound/upper_bound binary search (9 tests)
- ft-data: new crate with Dataset trait, TensorDataset, DataLoader with
  shuffle/drop_last/batching, SequentialSampler, RandomSampler,
  SubsetRandomSampler, WeightedRandomSampler, BatchSampler (34 tests)
- ft-serialize: save_state_dict/load_state_dict with FTSV binary format
  supporting F64/F32 dtypes, magic bytes, versioning (12 tests)
- ft-kernel-cpu: nonzero_tensor_contiguous_f64, masked_select_tensor_contiguous_f64

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
